description_long: This is a large, rectangular plant pot with a mint green exterior and a prominent floral print on its main faces. The floral imagery features a dense arrangement of colorful flowers and green foliage, giving the pot a vibrant, garden-like appearance. The text 'FLOWER 20' is printed in bold on the front, accompanied by smaller text and a smaller inset image of the same floral scene. The pot appears to be made of a sturdy, hard material, likely plastic or composite, with a smooth, matte finish. Its size suggests it is suitable for medium to large plants and would be a striking decorative element in an urban environment. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor use.
description: A large, mint green rectangular plant pot with vivid floral imagery and bold text, featuring a smooth, matte finish and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main floral print, 'FLOWER 20' text, and a smaller inset image on a mint green background.
description_view_1: Side view with the floral print extending vertically, less text visible, and a more elongated appearance.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same floral print and layout, but text is less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with the floral print and minimal text, emphasizing the pot's height.
attribute_placement_context: ideal for public parks, building entrances, or modern urban plazas
